response.justification: Over 15 years of full-stack engineering with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes coverage maps closely to the role's core stack; current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement. The primary gaps are no explicit Nest.js experience, limited Kotlin depth, and no Python in the skills list.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React background across multiple production environments at scale
Active AI-agent and developer-tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) aligns precisely with the role's emerging-tech requirement
Broad infrastructure coverage — AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, MySQL — satisfies cloud and database requirements
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere; adoption curve to the team's primary backend framework is unknown
Python and Kotlin absent from the skills list despite both being required or secondary in the role
Testing experience is demonstrated through TDD practices and a self-built D-language library but specific Jest/Vitest/Playwright usage is not called out

key_factors.factor: AI agent development at current role
